<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/meshobjects/meshtagdefinitions"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Create a new meshTagDefinition

**Authentication:** This endpoint supports API Key authentication.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"Accept","in":"header","description":"This endpoint of meshObject API is individually <<versioning,versioned>>. Use `application/vnd.meshcloud.api.meshtagdefinition.v1.hal+json` for this version of the endpoint.","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"},"example":"application/vnd.meshcloud.api.meshtagdefinition.v1.hal+json"}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/vnd.meshcloud.api.meshtagdefinition.v1.hal+json;charset=UTF-8":{"schema":{"type":"object","title":"api-meshobjects-meshpaymentmethods486549215"},"examples":{"meshTagDefinitionPost":{"value":"{\n  \"apiVersion\": \"v1\",\n  \"kind\": \"meshTagDefinition\",\n  \"metadata\": {\n    \"name\": \"meshProject.environment\"\n  },\n  \"spec\": {\n    \"targetKind\": \"meshProject\",\n    \"key\": \"environment\",\n    \"valueType\": {\n      \"singleSelect\": {\n        \"options\": [ \"dev\", \"test\", \"qa\", \"production\" ],\n        \"defaultValue\": \"dev\"\n      }\n    },\n    \"description\": \"The environment the project runs in.\",\n    \"displayName\": \"Environment\",\n    \"sortOrder\": 9999,\n    \"mandatory\": true,\n    \"immutable\": false,\n    \"restricted\": false\n  }\n}"}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"201":{"description":"201","content":{"application/vnd.meshcloud.api.meshtagdefinition.v1.hal+json":{"schema":{"title":"meshTagDefinitionPost","type":"object"},"examples":{"meshTagDefinitionPost":{"value":"{\n  \"kind\" : \"meshTagDefinition\",\n  \"apiVersion\" : \"v1\",\n  \"metadata\" : {\n    \"name\" : \"meshProject.environment\"\n  },\n  \"spec\" : {\n    \"targetKind\" : \"meshProject\",\n    \"key\" : \"environment\",\n    \"valueType\" : {\n      \"singleSelect\" : {\n        \"options\" : [ \"dev\", \"test\", \"qa\", \"production\" ],\n        \"defaultValue\" : \"dev\"\n      }\n    },\n    \"description\" : \"The environment the project runs in.\",\n    \"displayName\" : \"Environment\",\n    \"sortOrder\" : 9999,\n    \"mandatory\" : true,\n    \"immutable\" : false,\n    \"restricted\" : false\n  },\n  \"_links\" : {\n    \"self\" : {\n      \"href\" : \"https://mesh-backend-url/api/meshobjects/meshtagdefinitions/meshProject.environment\"\n    }\n  }\n}"}}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
